text:
Yesterday: Created the sprint plan and reviewed the current task board.
Today: Check in with each developer and prepare the demo agenda.
Blockers: Waiting for final feature estimates from the development team.

Yesterday: Built the first version of the API endpoint for saving user feedback.
Today: Add validation and write unit tests for the feedback endpoint.
Blockers: Need clarification on the required feedback fields.

Yesterday: Designed the dashboard layout and created reusable card components.
Today: Connect the dashboard cards to sample data.
Blockers: None

Yesterday: Tested prompt formats for summarizing project updates.
Today: Create a simple summary generator using sample standup data.
Blockers: Need access to the latest sample responses.
